title: Querer
description: Expresar deseos y cosas que se quieren hacer.

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: What do you want to do after class?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L16-01 - E1161 - Noah - What do you want to do after class.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I want to go to the library.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L16-02 - E1162 - Ethan - I want to go to the library.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: I want to finish my homework.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L16-03 - E1163 - Mia - I want to finish my homework.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: I want to play basketball.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L16-04 - E1164 - Noah - I want to play basketball.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: What kind of book do you want?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L43-01 - E1431 - Emma - What kind of book do you want.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I want an easy English book.
items.translation: Quiero un libro de inglés fácil.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L43-02 - E1432 - Ethan - I want an easy English book.mp3

items.speaker: Clerk
items.text: Would you like the blue or black one?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L44-05 - E1445 - Clerk - Would you like the blue or black one.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: What movie do you want to see?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L45-01 - E1451 - Noah - What movie do you want to see.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: I want to see the comedy.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L45-02 - E1452 - Mia - I want to see the comedy.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: What kind of job do you want?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L37-02 - E2372 - Mia - What kind of job do you want.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I'd like to work in a bookstore or café.
items.translation: Me gustaría trabajar en una librería o café.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L37-03 - E2373 - Ethan - I'd like to work in a bookstore or café.mp3

items.speaker: Manager
items.text: Why do you want to work here?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L39-01 - E2391 - Manager - Why do you want to work here.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I want to save some of my pay.
items.translation: Quiero ahorrar parte de mi pago.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L43-01 - E2431 - Ethan - I want to save some of my pay.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Yes, I want to buy a better camera.
items.translation: Sí, quiero comprar una cámara mejor.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L43-05 - E2435 - Ethan - Yes, I want to buy a better camera.mp3

items.speaker: Clerk
items.text: Would you like a checking or savings account?
items.translation: ¿Quiere una cuenta corriente o de ahorros?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L44-01 - E2441 - Clerk - Would you like a checking or savings account.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I'd like to see several countries.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L46-06 - E2466 - Ethan - I'd like to see several countries.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Why do you want to join the program?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L48-01 - E2481 - Emma - Why do you want to join the program.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I want to improve my English and become more independent.
items.translation: Quiero mejorar mi inglés y volverme más independiente.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L48-02 - E2482 - Ethan - I want to improve my English and become more independent.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: I don't mean that.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L01-01 - BR1011 - Ava - I don't mean that.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: What do you mean?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L01-02 - BR1012 - Leo - What do you mean.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: I mean we should leave later.
items.translation: Quiero decir que deberíamos salir más tarde.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L01-03 - BR1013 - Ava - I mean we should leave later.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: So you want to leave earlier?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L07-02 - BR1072 - Leo - So you want to leave earlier.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: Do you want to hang out?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L12-03 - BR1123 - Ben - Do you want to hang out.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: Maybe. Where do you want to go?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L13-02 - BR1132 - Nora - Maybe. Where do you want to go.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: Now I see what you mean.
items.translation: Ahora entiendo lo que quieres decir.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L19-06 - BR1196 - Ben - Now I see what you mean.mp3
